name: Marinated Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice mushrooms in half through stems.
2. Quarter artichoke hearts.
3. Combine artichoke hearts and mushrooms.
4. In a separate bowl, mix remaining ingredients (olive oil, garlic, peppercorns, thyme, vinegar, salt, basil, bay leaf, lemon juice).
5. Pour the mixture over the mushrooms and artichoke hearts.
6. Refrigerate overnight.
7. Remove peppercorns and bay leaf before serving.
